infobox.value: This [East Flanders](/wiki/East_Flanders "East Flanders") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Desteldonk&action=edit).

(French pronunciation: [[ˈdɛstəldɔŋk]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French")) is a [sub-municipality](/wiki/Sub-municipality "Sub-municipality") of the [city](/wiki/City_status_in_Belgium "City status in Belgium") of [Ghent](/wiki/Ghent "Ghent") located in the [province of East Flanders](/wiki/East_Flanders "East Flanders"), [Flemish Region](/wiki/Flemish_Region "Flemish Region"), [Belgium](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium"). It was a separate [municipality](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Belgium "Municipalities of Belgium") until 1965. In 1927, part of the original municipality was already annexed to Ghent.[[2]](#cite_note-2) On 1 January 1965, the municipality of Desteldonk was [merged](/wiki/Fusion_of_the_Belgian_municipalities "Fusion of the Belgian municipalities") into Ghent.[[3]](#cite_note-3)
["LISTE ALPHABETIQUE DES COMMUNES - Fusions de 1963 à 1977"](https://doc.statbel.fgov.be/publications/M000.03/M000.03FN_Comm_Gem_1963-1977.pdf) (PDF).

**Desteldonk** (French pronunciation: [[ˈdɛstəldɔŋk]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French")) is a [sub-municipality](/wiki/Sub-municipality "Sub-municipality") of the [city](/wiki/City_status_in_Belgium "City status in Belgium") of [Ghent](/wiki/Ghent "Ghent") located in the [province of East Flanders](/wiki/East_Flanders "East Flanders"), [Flemish Region](/wiki/Flemish_Region "Flemish Region"), [Belgium](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium"). It was a separate [municipality](/wiki/Municipalities_of_Belgium "Municipalities of Belgium") until 1965. In 1927, part of the original municipality was already annexed to Ghent.[[2]](#cite_note-2) On 1 January 1965, the municipality of Desteldonk was [merged](/wiki/Fusion_of_the_Belgian_municipalities "Fusion of the Belgian municipalities") into Ghent.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

The first historical record of Desteldonk dates back to 966 when it was listed as Thesledung. In 1236, it was named as a parish.
